name: Turbo Doomer
desc: Ascend to Level 9 and field 5-cost Doomer Vex alongside a Dark Star frontline. Cap with Bard and Blitzcrank for legendary power.
godWhy: Ahri's XP + gold offerings rush the Fast 9 timing this comp needs.
gameplan: Stage 2-3: hold items, play Dark Star/Brawler frontline. Stage 4: level 7->8 while preserving gold. Stage 5-2: level 9 and roll hard for Vex 2, then cap with Bard/Blitzcrank.

name: Stay Groovy
desc: Pop off with 5 Space Groove. Nami hypercarry backed by Nunu wall, Riven pressure, and Blitzcrank utility.
godWhy: Evelynn's assassination tempo pairs with Riven/Nami burst while Nunu stalls.
gameplan: Stage 2: winstreak with early Space Groove pairs. Stage 3-4: Fast 8 with 30-50g health buffer. Stage 5: level 9 for 5-cost flex.

name: Snipin & Vibin
desc: Triple Sniper backline with Jhin + Xayah. Stargazer 3 boost, Nunu frontline absorbs everything.
godWhy: Ekko's reroll offerings find Jhin and Xayah 2 fast for Fast 8 spikes.
gameplan: Stage 2: 4 Stargazer + 2 Bastion winstreak. Stage 4-2: level 8, roll for Jhin/Xayah 2. Stage 5: slot Bard + Mordekaiser for legendary cap.

name: Cards & Cartridges
desc: 1-cost reroll around Fateweaver 4 + Stargazer 3. Hit Twisted Fate 3 and cap with NOVA/Rogue late.
godWhy: Yasuo's extra rolls fuel the 1-cost reroll tempo this comp lives on.
gameplan: Stage 2: do not level past 4, save gold, open fort if HP is safe. Stage 3-2: level 5 and slow roll 50g+ for Twisted Fate 3. Stage 4-2: level 6-7 and add NOVA/Rogue.

name: Primordian NOVA Reroll
desc: Primordian 3 + NOVA 5 reroll. Bel'Veth 3 carries; cap with Kindred 2 as secondary late.
godWhy: Soraka keeps you healthy while slow-rolling at 5 for Bel'Veth 3.
gameplan: Stage 2: field 3 Primordian ASAP, do not level. Stage 3-2: level 5, slow roll 50g+ for Bel'Veth 3. Stage 4+: level 6-8 and add NOVA for Kindred duo.

name: N.O.V.A. Flex
desc: Full 5 N.O.V.A. board with Kindred hypercarry. Graves and Tahm Kench swing as dual carry/tank.
godWhy: Kayle's combat buffs stack on the 5 N.O.V.A. bonuses for a ridiculous mid-game spike.
gameplan: Stage 2-3: pivot into NOVA when you see AD components + econ augment. Stage 4-2: level 8, roll for Kindred + Tahm 2. Stage 5: add 5-cost flex (Bard/Blitz/Shen).

name: NOVA YI
desc: NOVA Emblem gives Yi/Fiora/Graves +1 NOVA. Kindred is the primary; Yi as Psionic bruiser side-carry.
godWhy: Varus offerings help hit Kindred 2 + a 5-cost cap while NOVA provides the consistent scaling.
gameplan: Stage 2: Primordian/Timebreaker econ opener. Stage 4-1: level 7 and stabilize Brawler. Stage 4-2: level 8, roll for Kindred 2 + Tahm 2. Always pick NOVA Emblem when offered.

name: Mirror Mayhem
desc: Vanguard Voyager flex with LeBlanc + Karma + Nunu triple threat. Arbiter 3 + Shepherd 3 for mid-range power.
godWhy: Aurelion Sol's anvils let you pick the emblem that completes Vanguard/Arbiter/Shepherd overlap.
gameplan: Stage 2-3: play Shepherd summons to streak. Stage 4-1/4-2: Fast 8 and drop LeBlanc. Stage 5: add Karma as AP secondary.

name: Slap & Zap
desc: Viktor 2 hypercarry with Nami and Illaoi as AP secondaries. Replicator + Space Groove overlap.
godWhy: Thresh anvils fish for Viktor 2 on the level 7 slow roll.
gameplan: Stage 2-3: build econ, hold AP items. Stage 4-1: level 7 and slow roll for Viktor 2. Stage 5: level 8 and slot Nami + Blitz.

name: Two Tanky Takeover
desc: Samira knock-up chain with Ornn as tanky secondary. Two Tanky augment locks this in.
godWhy: Yasuo rerolls find Samira 2 + Ornn 2 at the 7 slow-roll window.
gameplan: Stage 2: open fort with Brawlers. Stage 4-1: level 7, slow roll with 50+ gold for Samira 2. Stage 5: level 8 for Shen/Blitz cap.

name: Rogue Diff
desc: Kai'Sa backline assassin with Rhaast + Ornn frontline. Rogue 4 punishes squishy backlines.
godWhy: Evelynn's assassin synergy stacks with Rogue backline access.
gameplan: Stage 3: level 6 with Rogue 2. Stage 4-1: level 7, slow roll for Kai'Sa 2 + Rhaast 2. Stage 5: level 8 + Shen/Bard cap.

name: Mecha Sol
desc: Aurelion Sol AP cannon with Mecha frontline. Scales into legendary burst late.
godWhy: Kayle combat buffs let Aurelion Sol melt squishy backlines.
gameplan: Stage 2-3: Mecha 2 + Voyager 2 winstreak. Stage 4-2: level 8. Stage 5: roll for Aurelion Sol 2 and drop Bard/Morgana flex.

name: Fast 9 Jhin Stargazer
desc: Stargazer 6 + Sniper 3 legendary board. Xayah + Jhin + Bard + Shen wins every endgame fight.
godWhy: Ahri XP + gold is the fastest path to level 9 and 5-cost spam.
gameplan: Stage 2-3: lose streak to save HP. Stage 4-1: level 8 for Stargazer 4. Stage 5-2: level 9 and roll for Xayah, Jhin, Bard, Shen.

name: TF Reroll
desc: Classic Twisted Fate 3 with Fateweaver 4. Easier variant of Cards & Cartridges.
godWhy: Extra rolls make 3-starring TF + Talon almost guaranteed.
gameplan: Stage 2: do not level, hold gold. Stage 3-2: level 5 slow roll. Stage 4-1: level 6 and roll for TF 3. Stage 5: level 7-8 for cap.

name: Vanguard Teemo
desc: Teemo 3 AS monster with Vanguard 4 frontline. Classic 1-cost reroll fallback.
godWhy: Soraka sustain keeps your 1-cost reroll board alive to hit 3-stars.
gameplan: Stage 2: do not level. Stage 3-2: level 5 and slow roll for Teemo 3 + Poppy 3. Stage 4: level 6-7 and cap with Vanguard 4.

name: Invader Zed
desc: Zed hero-augment carry only. Requires Invader Zed augment and Galaxy Hunter trait.
godWhy: Evelynn backline access is exactly what Zed wants.
gameplan: Requires Invader Zed hero augment. Slam items on Zed, level 7 slow roll for Zed 2, cap with Rhaast + Shen.
